info.title: BRP Mock Register
info.description: Mock BRP (Basisregistratie Personen) register with RVIG test data for development and testing. Contains fictional person records aligned to the Haal Centraal BRP Personen Bevragen API v2 data model.

x-openregister.description: BRP mock register for development and testing — self-contained, no external API credentials needed

brp.title: BRP (Basisregistratie Personen)
brp.description: Mock BRP register with fictional RVIG test persons. Contains 32 person records covering family relationships, foreign nationals, deceased persons, minors, and persons in onderzoek.

ingeschreven-persoon.title: Ingeschreven Persoon
ingeschreven-persoon.summary: A person registered in the BRP (Basisregistratie Personen)
ingeschreven-persoon.description: Represents an ingeschreven persoon as defined by the Haal Centraal BRP Personen Bevragen API v2 data model. Contains personal details, address information, family relationships, nationality, and life events.

aanduidingNaamgebruik.description: Name usage indicator: E=eigen, P=partner, V=partner+eigen, N=eigen+partner

geboortedatum.description: Date of birth in ISO 8601 format

datumInschrijvingInGemeente.description: Date of registration in the municipality

immigratie.description: Immigration details (optional, only for persons who immigrated)

datumVestiging.description: Date of settlement in the Netherlands

overlijden.description: Death details (optional, only for deceased persons)

soortVerbintenis.description: Type of partnership: H=huwelijk, P=geregistreerd partnerschap
